message:
feat(robot): add blocker-chain, impact-network, and causality commands

Implements --robot-blocker-chain (BFS blocker traversal with cycle detection),
--robot-impact-network (dependency/shared-commit/shared-file network with
cluster detection and subnetwork extraction), and --robot-causality (temporal
event chain with blocked period analysis and recommendations).

All 15 causal unit tests and 31 schema validation tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -260,6 +260,18 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, default_value_t = 10)]
     pub related_limit: usize,
 
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_blocker_chain: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_impact_network: Option<String>,
+
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 2)]
+    pub network_depth: usize,
+
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot_causality: Option<String>,
+
     #[arg(long)]
     pub export_md: Option<PathBuf>,
 
@@ -317,5 +329,8 @@ impl Cli {
             || self.robot_impact.is_some()
             || self.robot_file_relations.is_some()
             || self.robot_related.is_some()
+            || self.robot_blocker_chain.is_some()
+            || self.robot_impact_network.is_some()
+            || self.robot_causality.is_some()
     }
 }
